product: Diabetic retinopathy screening AI for primary care settings
primary_challenge: No recent ticket or Aria activity in 8 days. Milestone 2 at 10% on Day 31. Possible team reshuffle or technical blocker not yet named.
twelve_month_goal: FDA 510(k) submission and deployment in 50 primary care clinics across rural markets
investor_narrative: Bringing specialist-level retinal screening to primary care eliminates the referral gap that causes 40% of preventable blindness cases
